content:
PRODUCTION EVIDENCE V1

Repository:
ibb142/rork-ivxholding--1

The watchdog implementation is complete.

Now replace ALL placeholder values with real production evidence.

Do not return example values.

Collect and return:

1. GitHub
- Repository
- Branch
- Latest Commit SHA
- Commit URL
- Commit timestamp

2. Render
- Service name
- Deploy ID
- Deploy status
- Deploy start
- Deploy finish
- Deployed commit SHA

3. Production
- /health response
- HTTP status
- Health SHA
- /version response (if available)

4. Chat
- Last conversation auto-open: PASS/FAIL
- Message persistence: PASS/FAIL
- AI reply: PASS/FAIL

5. Watchdog
Return actual checkpoint timings:

SEND_TAP:
USER_ROW_INSERTED:
AI_TRIGGER_DECISION:
COMMAND_ROUTER:
AI_REQUEST_SENT:
AI_RESPONSE_RECEIVED:
MESSAGE_PERSISTED:
STREAM_STARTED:
STREAM_COMPLETED:
UI_UPDATED:

6. Commit verification

Compare:

GitHub SHA
Render SHA
Health SHA

Return:

COMMIT_MATCH:
YES or NO

FINAL_STATUS may be COMPLETE only if every placeholder has been replaced with verified production evidence.
